task_completion.description: Verify that the Thunderbird Address Book window is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird Address Book interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the retiring provider 'Robert Vance' has been removed from the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact list in the Address Book no longer contains 'Robert Vance', or there is a visible action (like a context menu or confirmation dialog) showing his deletion.

task_completion.description: Verify that the dialog to add a new contact is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Contact' window or form is visible within the Thunderbird application.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new contact details for Dr. Sarah Jenkins are entered correctly into the form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The New Contact form shows 'Sarah' (First Name), 'Jenkins' (Last Name), 'Dr. Sarah Jenkins' (Display Name), 's.jenkins@synthea.example.com' (Email), '555-839-2011' (Work Phone), and 'Neurologist' (Title) typed into their respective fields.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new contact is saved and successfully added to the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Dr. Sarah Jenkins' is visible in the main Address Book contact list, or her completed contact summary card is displayed in the Thunderbird UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to update the address book rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Thunderbird UI. There should be no terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or scripts modifying Thunderbird database files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Mozilla Thunderbird application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird logo, window titles, and standard UI elements are present, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing bash or python scripts being executed to modify 'abook.sqlite' or other profile files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new provider to be added must have the following exact details: First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Jenkins', Display Name: 'Dr. Sarah Jenkins', Email: 's.jenkins@synthea.example.com', Work Phone: '555-839-2011', Title: 'Neurologist'. The retiring provider to be removed is 'Robert Vance'.
